name: Nox Vyllana
description:
A deadly moon-elf as vicious and twisted as the elven courts that raised him.

Nox Vyllana is a nightmare incarnate, a shadowy harbinger of pain and death. Bred by the infamous Vyllana family as a living instrument of destruction, he has elevated their ruthless teachings into an art form, embracing his role as a fanatical weapon with unrelenting fervor. No job is too heinous, no act too cruel, no atrocity too unspeakable for him to execute, so long as it furthers his family's sinister ambitions. He revels in the chaos he creates, finding twisted joy in every drop of blood spilled in their name. To him, mercy is weakness, and hesitation is betrayal. Nox thrives in the fear he inspires, his presence alone enough to turn the bravest hearts to ice.

Dark Fantasy Music
creator: Sweston
